exact.all_interval_theorem: H_(4,n)(lambda)>0 for every integer n>=0 and every lambda in [-100,0]
exact.base_ratio: the published lambda-zero Xi ratios have h=Delta(M)^2->0, G_2(M)->1, bounded G_3,...,G_7, and an o(h^6) local remainder
exact.finite_splice_status: the previous non-effective lambda-zero splice is closed indirectly by uniform tail confinement and backward cooperative propagation
exact.heat_coefficient_scale: c_r(T,M)=O(log(M)/M^r) and h(M)~1/(2M) imply c_r(T,M)/h(M)^(r-1)=O(log(M)/M)=o(1), r=2,...,6
exact.kernel_remainder: all fixed local log differences of log(A_k(-T)/A_k^(1)(-T)) are O_p,m(k^-p) uniformly for every p>0
exact.uniform_eventual_tail: there exists N such that H_(4,n)(lambda)>0 for every n>=N and -100<=lambda<=0
exact.uniform_ratio_consequence: the complete A_k(lambda) family satisfies the uniform degree-seven ratio contract on -100<=lambda<=0 with the same G_2 limit 1

newton_transfer.exactness: q_M(j)=f(M-j)-f(M) exactly on all seven determinant nodes
newton_transfer.graded_output: after division by h(M)^(r-1), every heat correction to G_r is O(log(M)/M)=o(1)
newton_transfer.triangular_support: the coefficient of j^r uses only D_m with m>=r and has D_r/r! on its diagonal

proof_boundary: This artifact proves H_(4,n)(lambda)>0 for every contiguous shift n>=0 and every -100<=lambda<=0. It does not prove noncontiguous or arbitrary-column order-four minors, any compound order five or higher, PF-infinity, the all-degree Jensen criterion, RH, or Lambda<=0.
remaining_target: derive arbitrary-column order-four sign regularity or begin a genuinely new contiguous order-five entry and invariance layer

rows.claim: The published Xi ratio theorem and exact determinant cancellation give the universal positive order-four main term at lambda zero.
rows.formula: the published lambda-zero Xi ratios have h=Delta(M)^2->0, G_2(M)->1, bounded G_3,...,G_7, and an o(h^6) local remainder; 768*G_2^6*h^6
rows.proof_boundary: Eventual contiguous order-four asymptotic input only.

rows.claim: The first theta summand has the required seven compact-uniform heat-tilt ratio estimates.

diagnostics.source_formula: Delta_k^m log R_T^(1)(k)=O(log(k)/k^m) uniformly for 0<=T<=100 and m=2,...,7

rows.claim: Every higher-theta correction needed by the fixed order-four stencil is uniformly superpolynomial.

diagnostics.source_formula: for every p>0 and fixed m, sup_(0<=T<=100)|nabla^m e_k(T)|=O_p,m(k^(-p))

rows.formula: all fixed local log differences of log(A_k(-T)/A_k^(1)(-T)) are O_p,m(k^-p) uniformly for every p>0

rows.claim: The full heat-deformed Xi coefficient family inherits the uniform degree-seven ratio expansion and the unchanged positive quadratic limit.

diagnostics.graded_scale: c_r(T,M)=O(log(M)/M^r) and h(M)~1/(2M) imply c_r(T,M)/h(M)^(r-1)=O(log(M)/M)=o(1), r=2,...,6

newton_transfer.exactness: q_M(j)=f(M-j)-f(M) exactly on all seven determinant nodes
newton_transfer.graded_output: after division by h(M)^(r-1), every heat correction to G_r is O(log(M)/M)=o(1)
newton_transfer.triangular_support: the coefficient of j^r uses only D_m with m>=r and has D_r/r! on its diagonal

rows.formula: the complete A_k(lambda) family satisfies the uniform degree-seven ratio contract on -100<=lambda<=0 with the same G_2 limit 1
rows.proof_boundary: Compact heat interval and seven-point local ratios only.

rows.claim: The universal determinant expansion proves one strictly positive order-four tail uniformly across the full heat interval.
rows.formula: H_(4,n)(lambda)=positive_scale(lambda,n)*(768*G_2(lambda,n)^6*h(lambda,n)^6+o(h(lambda,n)^6)) uniformly; there exists N such that H_(4,n)(lambda)>0 for every n>=N and -100<=lambda<=0
rows.proof_boundary: Uniform eventual contiguous order-four theorem; the threshold is non-effective.

rows.claim: All-shift lambda=-100 entry and the completed order-three layer supply a strictly cooperative order-four flow.
rows.proof_boundary: Previously certified entry and local flow inputs.

rows.claim: The uniform positive tail reduces the infinite flow to finite backward variation-of-constants propagation.
rows.proof_boundary: Exact finite-confinement argument; no global coefficient ceiling.

rows.claim: Every shifted contiguous order-four determinant remains strictly positive from lambda=-100 through lambda=0.
rows.formula: H_(4,n)(lambda)>0 for every integer n>=0 and every lambda in [-100,0]

rows.claim: Every shifted contiguous four-by-four Hankel minor has the required positive sign at lambda zero.

diagnostics.splice: the previous non-effective lambda-zero splice is closed indirectly by uniform tail confinement and backward cooperative propagation

rows.proof_boundary: Not arbitrary-column order four, higher compounds, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.

source_diagnostics.heat_tilt: Delta_k^m log R_T^(1)(k)=O(log(k)/k^m) uniformly for 0<=T<=100 and m=2,...,7
source_diagnostics.higher_theta: for every p>0 and fixed m, sup_(0<=T<=100)|nabla^m e_k(T)|=O_p,m(k^(-p))

status: all-shift contiguous order-four forward invariance through lambda zero
